description: Curated puzzle collections organized by theme, difficulty, and author. Single source of truth for collection metadata and alias matching.

changelog.author: claude
changelog.changes: Kada Katsuji enrichment: added 3 new collections (tsumego-brilliances ID 171, tsumego-class ID 172, tsumego-masterpieces ID 173). 700 puzzles total.

changelog.author: claude
changelog.changes: Maeda Nobuaki enrichment: renamed 5 slugs to maeda-nobuaki-* format (old slugs preserved as aliases), added 4 new collections (advanced-tsumego, delightful-tsumego, tsumego-for-the-millions, newly-selected-100-continued). 9 total Maeda collections.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Added optional level_hint for collection-based level override.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Added numeric IDs for compact schema.

collections.name: Advanced Essentials
collections.description: Curated learning path for advanced kyu players (5k-1k). Deep reading and advanced tesuji application.
aliases: Graded Go Problems for Dan Players — Life & Death

collections.name: Beginner Essentials
collections.description: Curated learning path for beginner players (25k-21k). Basic captures and simple life-and-death patterns.

collections.description: Problems about connecting groups by playing underneath the opponent's stones (watari technique).

collections.description: Problems focused on cutting opponent's stones apart, separating groups to attack individually.

collections.description: Quick daily practice with puzzles from all categories and difficulties. Auto-generated for daily study routine.

collections.name: Fujisawa Shuuko: Tsumego Classroom
collections.description: Fujisawa Shuuko's tsumego classroom series (藤沢秀行詰碁教室, Yomiuri 1980, 2 volumes: beginner and intermediate/advanced).

collections.name: Fujisawa Shuuko: Original Tsumego Masterpiece
collections.description: Original creative tsumego compositions by Fujisawa Shuuko, 6-time Kisei title holder (秀行創作詰碁傑作集, Nihon Ki-in 1980). 163 problems in 4 graded chapters.

collections.name: Genran (玄覧)
collections.description: Classical Japanese Go problem collection of traditional provenance, featuring elegant compositions of enduring study value.

collections.name: Go Seigen: Evil Moves Tsumego
collections.description: Go Seigen's collection of deceptive and tricky tsumego featuring unexpected and surprising solutions.

collections.name: Go Seigen: Tsumego Dojo
collections.description: Tsumego training collection by Go Seigen, widely regarded as the greatest Go player of the 20th century.

collections.name: Gokyo Seimyo (碁経精妙)
collections.description: Refined companion to the Gokyo Shumyo, also compiled by Hayashi Genbi. Features carefully selected and polished problems.

collections.name: Gokyo Shumyo (碁経衆妙)
collections.description: Classical collection of 520 tsumego problems compiled by Hayashi Genbi in 1812. One of the most important Go problem collections ever created.

collections.name: Guanzi Pu (官子谱)
collections.description: Classical Chinese endgame and life-and-death collection compiled by Guo Bailing during the Qing dynasty (1660s).

collections.description: Hashimoto Utaro's collection named after the Tokaido road stations, featuring 53 progressively challenging problems.

collections.name: Hashimoto Utaro: Moves to Attack and Protect
collections.description: Hashimoto Utaro's collection focused on attacking and defending tesuji in practical game situations.

collections.name: Hashimoto Utaro: Enjoy Tsumego
collections.description: A collection by Hashimoto Utaro designed to be enjoyable and instructive, fostering a love for tsumego.

collections.name: Hashimoto Utaro: Famous Creations 300
collections.description: 300 carefully selected tsumego by Hashimoto Utaro, showcasing his creative and artistic problem construction.

collections.name: Hashimoto Utaro: Moments of the Wind
collections.description: Multi-volume collection by Hashimoto Utaro featuring innovative tsumego compositions. All volumes in one collection.

collections.name: Hashimoto Utaro: Tsumego for the Millions
collections.description: Classic popular tsumego collection by Hashimoto Utaro, aimed at a wide audience of Go players.

collections.name: High Dan Essentials
collections.description: Curated learning path for high dan players (4d-6d). Professional study level problems.

collections.name: Igo Hatsuyoron (囲碁発陽論)
collections.description: Masterwork of 183 problems by Inoue Dosetsu Inseki (1713). Contains some of the most challenging tsumego ever composed.

collections.name: Essential Go Techniques (围棋1000题)
collections.description: Comprehensive technique-organized tsumego covering 25 categories across life & death and tesuji. Two chapters: Chapter 1 (life, eyes, semeai, seki, vital point, ko, theory, shapes) and Chapter 2 (ladder, cut, net, hane, wedge, diagonal, bridge, jump, pincer, stand, throw-in, squeeze, shortage of liberties, under the stones).

collections.name: Hashimoto Utaro: Skillful Life and Death
collections.description: Hashimoto Utaro's collection of 179 skillful life-and-death problems with explicit puzzle intent labels.

collections.name: Maeda Nobuaki: Advanced Tsumego
collections.description: 150 advanced tsumego by Maeda Nobuaki for dan-level players. JOKYU (上級) volume, completing the 3-volume graded series.

collections.name: Maeda Nobuaki: Delightful Tsumego
collections.description: 160 delightful tsumego curated from Maeda Nobuaki's God of Tsumego collection, selected for elegance and instructional value.

collections.name: Maeda Nobuaki: Tsumego for the Millions
collections.description: 144 tsumego from Maeda Nobuaki's 'Tsumego for the Millions' (百万人の詰碁), a widely accessible problem collection.

collections.name: Maeda Nobuaki: Newly Selected 100 (Continued)
collections.description: 100 continuation problems from Maeda Nobuaki's Newly Selected series for 1-8k players.

collections.name: Ishida Yoshio 3-Dan Tsumego Challenge
collections.description: 3-Dan level tsumego challenge collection by Ishida Yoshio (石田芳夫), organized in three progressive stages.

collections.name: Attack and Defense (Ishida & Davies)
collections.description: Positions from the Elementary Go Series book 'Attack and Defense' by Ishida Akira and James Davies, focusing on middlegame strategy.

collections.name: Kada Katsuji: Tsumego Brilliances
collections.description: Shumyo Tsumego (衆妙詰碁) — 4-volume collection of exquisite life-and-death compositions by Kada Katsuji 9p. Published 1993-1994 by Seibundo Shinkosha.

collections.name: Kada Katsuji: Tsumego Class
collections.description: Kada Tsumego Kyoshitsu (加田詰碁教室) — Go Super Books vol. 15. Instructional tsumego collection with teaching commentary. Published 1971 by Nihon Ki-in.

collections.name: Kada Katsuji: Tsumego Masterpieces
collections.description: Kessaku Tsumego (傑作詰碁) — Definitive 8-volume tsumego collection by Kada Katsuji 9p, the "God of Tsumego". Published 1988-1991 by Seibundo Shinkosha.

collections.name: Go Seigen: Jikyou Fusoku — Striving for Self-Improvement
collections.description: Go Seigen's tsumego collection published by Seibundo Shinkosha in 1997. Title uses the classical Chinese idiom 自強不息 (ceaselessly striving for self-improvement). Part of a matched pair with Jushi Furou. ISBN 4-416-79711-7.

collections.name: Go Seigen: Jushi Furou — The Long-Lived Stone Is Not Old
collections.description: Go Seigen's tsumego collection published by Seibundo Shinkosha in 1995. Title uses the poetic phrase 寿石不老 (the long-lived stone does not age). Part of a matched pair with Jikyou Fusoku.

collections.name: Go Seigen: Reading and Training — Actual Game Situations
collections.description: Go Seigen's graded reading training collection organized by difficulty level: kyu (28 problems), dan (47 problems), and high-dan (47 problems).

collections.name: Go Seigen: Tsumego Collection
collections.description: Go Seigen's graded tsumego collection in two volumes: Shokyuu (初級, elementary, 240 problems) and Jokyuu (上級, advanced, 100 problems).
